task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the four new ITSM status labels with their correct types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Snipe-IT 'Status Labels' settings page showing the four new labels: 'ITSM - Awaiting Build' (Pending), 'ITSM - Vendor Repair' (Undeployable), 'ITSM - Security Review' (Undeployable), and 'ITSM - Disposed' (Archived).

task_completion.description: Verify assets at the 'Build Room' location were reassigned to 'ITSM - Awaiting Build'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the asset list or individual asset pages showing ASSET-BR01, ASSET-BR02, and ASSET-BR03 with the status 'ITSM - Awaiting Build'.

task_completion.description: Verify assets associated with the supplier 'TechFix Partners' were reassigned to 'ITSM - Vendor Repair'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the asset list or individual asset pages showing ASSET-TF01, ASSET-TF02, and ASSET-TF03 with the status 'ITSM - Vendor Repair'.

task_completion.description: Verify assets containing 'Security Hold' in their notes were reassigned to 'ITSM - Security Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the asset list or individual asset pages showing ASSET-SH01, ASSET-SH02, and ASSET-SH03 with the status 'ITSM - Security Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify assets containing 'Disposal Approved' in their notes were reassigned to 'ITSM - Disposed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the asset list or individual asset pages showing ASSET-DA01 and ASSET-DA02 with the status 'ITSM - Disposed'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web application in a web browser, not terminal commands, scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the asset assignments into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent writing the expected outcomes in a text editor or note-taking app instead of performing the task in Snipe-IT.

integrity.description: Verify that noise assets were not incorrectly reassigned to the new status labels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the new status labels' asset lists should NOT include ASSET-NS01, ASSET-NS02, ASSET-NS03, ASSET-NS04, or ASSET-NS05.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assets for 'ITSM - Awaiting Build': ASSET-BR01, ASSET-BR02, ASSET-BR03. Target assets for 'ITSM - Vendor Repair': ASSET-TF01, ASSET-TF02, ASSET-TF03. Target assets for 'ITSM - Security Review': ASSET-SH01, ASSET-SH02, ASSET-SH03. Target assets for 'ITSM - Disposed': ASSET-DA01, ASSET-DA02. Noise assets (must not be modified): ASSET-NS01, ASSET-NS02, ASSET-NS03, ASSET-NS04, ASSET-NS05.
